LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PHIL, INC. AND DEEPAK THOMAS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEEPACK THOMAS' DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY FEBRUARY 8, 2023. THE DECLARATION FAILED TO SPECIFY IF THE MEET AND CONFER WAS IN PERSON OR BY PHONE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DISCOVERY DEPT 302, AS TO JUN-20-2023 HEARING RE: MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL JUSTIN ALAN MORELLO APPEARING VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL MIKE LAURENSON APPEARING VIA ZOOM. PARTIES STIPULATE TO ALLOW JPT TO HEAR THE MATTER. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER WITH THE SANCTION PORTION LEFT BLANK, SERVE THE PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM, AND DELIVER A COPY TO THE COURT IN WORD FORMAT RKANE1089@AOL.COM. PRO TEM JUDGE KANE WILL RESEARCH THE MATTER OF SANCTIONS AND COMPLETE THE BLANK PORTION OF THE ORDER. HARD COPIES WILL BE DELIVERED TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM OF OPPOSITIONS. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT PHIL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Discussion held, arguments submitted.

Counsel for the defendant shall prepare an order with the sanction portion left blank, serve the Plaintiff for approval as to form, and deliver a copy to the court in WORD format rkane1089@aol.com. Pro Tem Judge Kane will research the matter of sanctions and complete the blank portion of the Order.

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PHIL, INC. and DEEPAK THOMAS' DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Deepack Thomas' demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response to the amended complaint is now due by February 8, 2023. The declaration failed to specify if the meet and confer was in person or by phone.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
